examples: Politicians' private lives have no relevance to their public roles.
Perhaps the students do not understand the relevance of the material to their studies.
Using the so-called Maxim of Relevance we can infer things as well, or rather the speaker can imply things and the listener can make inferences.
But I like the fact that, you know, a classic song can have relevance today, you know.
Although the jump had the appearance of another Baumgartner stunt, his team stressed its high scientific relevance.
